calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Garson Soe for petitioner Jean Y. Chin.

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets.

The Court stated it had reviewed the filings and asked whether any person objected to the relief requested. No objections were raised. There being no objection, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to waive irregularities and grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Continued To Nov-26-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-20-2025 Continued To Oct-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together:
1) PTR-25-308284, re: Frank S.Y. Chin Revocable Trust; and
2) PES-24-307978, Estate of Frank Chin

Appearances:
Garson C. Soe appeared for petitioner Jean Y. Chin.

The matter came on for hearing on: 1) Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets; and 2) Spousal Property Petition.

Mr. Soe requested a continuance in both the estate and trust matters in order to address examiner's notes and sought clarification regarding the validity of the trust. Counsel explained that the trust was notarized in Oregon and questioned the examiner's statement that the trust was "not valid." The Court advised counsel to continue efforts to contact the examiner directly for clarification. The Court also confirmed that the decedent was the same individual referenced in the record as Frank Chin, Frank S. Chin, and Frank S.Y. Chin.

Following discussion, the Court continued both matters to October 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
